# Overrides

Tests for override dependencies in resolution.

## Basic overrides

### Override from file

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::override_dependency -->

Override a transitive dependency with a specific version.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask==3.0.0
```

```toml overrides.txt
werkzeug==2.3.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask==3.0.0
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug==2.3.0
    # via
    #   --override overrides.txt
    #   flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

### Override from pyproject.toml

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::override_dependency_from_pyproject -->

The `tool.uv.override-dependencies` in pyproject.toml is respected.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[project]
name = "example"
version = "0.0.0"
dependencies = [
  "flask==3.0.0"
]

[tool.uv]
override-dependencies = [
  "werkzeug==2.3.0"
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask==3.0.0
    # via example (pyproject.toml)
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug==2.3.0
    # via
    #   --override (workspace)
    #   flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

### Override with markers

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::override_multi_dependency -->

Overrides can include markers for conditional application.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```toml overrides.txt
tomli>=1.1.0; python_version >= '3.11'
tomli<1.0.0; python_version < '3.11'
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
black==23.10.1
    # via -r requirements.in
click==8.1.7
    # via black
mypy-extensions==1.0.0
    # via black
packaging==24.0
    # via black
pathspec==0.12.1
    # via black
platformdirs==4.2.0
    # via black
tomli==2.0.1
    # via
    #   --override overrides.txt
    #   black

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

## Override with extras

### Override for non-activated extra

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::dont_add_override_for_non_activated_extra -->

Override shouldn't add packages for non-activated extras.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
urllib3==2.2.1
```

```toml overrides.txt
pysocks==1.7.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
urllib3==2.2.1
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

## URL overrides

### Override with URL

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::override_dependency_url -->

Override a dependency with a specific URL.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask==3.0.0
```

```toml overrides.txt
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/cc/94/5f7079a0e00bd6863ef8f1da638721e9da21e5bacee597595b318f71d62e/Werkzeug-1.0.1-py2.py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask==3.0.0
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via jinja2
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/cc/94/5f7079a0e00bd6863ef8f1da638721e9da21e5bacee597595b318f71d62e/Werkzeug-1.0.1-py2.py3-none-any.whl
    # via
    #   --override overrides.txt
    #   flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

### Override with unnamed URL

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::override_dependency_unnamed_url -->

Override a dependency with an unnamed URL.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask==3.0.0
```

```toml overrides.txt
https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/cc/94/5f7079a0e00bd6863ef8f1da638721e9da21e5bacee597595b318f71d62e/Werkzeug-1.0.1-py2.py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask==3.0.0
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via jinja2
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/cc/94/5f7079a0e00bd6863ef8f1da638721e9da21e5bacee597595b318f71d62e/Werkzeug-1.0.1-py2.py3-none-any.whl
    # via
    #   --override overrides.txt
    #   flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

### Disjoint override URLs in universal resolution

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::universal_disjoint_override_urls -->

Different URLs for different platforms in universal resolution.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio
```

```toml overrides.txt
sniffio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/e9/44/75a9c9421471a6c4805dbf2356f7c181a29c1879239abab1ea2cc8f38b40/sniffio-1.3.1-py3-none-any.whl ; sys_platform == 'win32'
sniffio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/c3/a0/5dba8ed157b0136607c7f2151db695885606968d1fae123dc3391e0cfdbf/sniffio-1.3.0-py3-none-any.whl ; sys_platform == 'darwin'
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --overrides overrides.txt --universal
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --overrides overrides.txt --universal
anyio==4.3.0
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/c3/a0/5dba8ed157b0136607c7f2151db695885606968d1fae123dc3391e0cfdbf/sniffio-1.3.0-py3-none-any.whl ; sys_platform == 'darwin'
    # via
    #   --override overrides.txt
    #   anyio
sniffio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/e9/44/75a9c9421471a6c4805dbf2356f7c181a29c1879239abab1ea2cc8f38b40/sniffio-1.3.1-py3-none-any.whl ; sys_platform == 'win32'
    # via
    #   --override overrides.txt
    #   anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 4 packages in [TIME]
```

### Conflicting override URLs

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::universal_conflicting_override_urls -->

Conflicting URLs for overlapping markers causes an error.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio
```

```toml overrides.txt
sniffio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/e9/44/75a9c9421471a6c4805dbf2356f7c181a29c1879239abab1ea2cc8f38b40/sniffio-1.3.1-py3-none-any.whl ; sys_platform == 'win32'
sniffio @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/c3/a0/5dba8ed157b0136607c7f2151db695885606968d1fae123dc3391e0cfdbf/sniffio-1.3.0-py3-none-any.whl ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'win32'
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --overrides overrides.txt --universal
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × Failed to resolve dependencies for `anyio` (v4.3.0)
  ╰─▶ Requirements contain conflicting URLs for package `sniffio` in split `sys_platform == 'win32'`:
      - https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/c3/a0/5dba8ed157b0136607c7f2151db695885606968d1fae123dc3391e0cfdbf/sniffio-1.3.0-py3-none-any.whl
      - https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/e9/44/75a9c9421471a6c4805dbf2356f7c181a29c1879239abab1ea2cc8f38b40/sniffio-1.3.1-py3-none-any.whl
```

## Override with constraint

### Compatible constraint and override

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::override_with_compatible_constraint -->

Override and constraint can work together when they resolve to the same version.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio
```

```toml constraints.txt
anyio<=3.0.0
```

```toml overrides.txt
anyio>=3.0.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt --override overrides.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt --override overrides.txt
anyio==3.0.0
    # via
    #   -c constraints.txt
    #   --override overrides.txt
    #   -r requirements.in
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Incompatible constraint and override

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::override_with_incompatible_constraint -->

Incompatible override and constraint causes an error.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio
```

```toml constraints.txt
anyio<3.0.0
```

```toml overrides.txt
anyio>=3.0.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --constraint constraints.txt --override overrides.txt
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × No solution found when resolving dependencies:
  ╰─▶ Because you require anyio>=3.0.0 and anyio<3.0.0, we can conclude that your requirements are unsatisfiable.
```

## Editable overrides

### Override with editable

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::editable_override -->

Override a package with an editable install.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black
```

```toml overrides.txt
-e ../../test/packages/black_editable
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in --override [TEMP_DIR]/overrides.txt
-e ../../test/packages/black_editable
    # via
    #   --override [TEMP_DIR]/overrides.txt
    #   -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Override editable with registry package

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::override_editable -->

Override an editable with a regular package.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
-e ../../test/packages/black_editable
```

```toml overrides.txt
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --override overrides.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in --override [TEMP_DIR]/overrides.txt
black==23.10.1
    # via
    #   --override [TEMP_DIR]/overrides.txt
    #   -r [TEMP_DIR]/requirements.in
click==8.1.7
    # via black
mypy-extensions==1.0.0
    # via black
packaging==24.0
    # via black
pathspec==0.12.1
    # via black
platformdirs==4.2.0
    # via black

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```
